title: Flaxa Combat – Advanced PvP System with Combat Tag
description: A clean and optimized combat system plugin that prevents combat logging, blocks unfair escapes, and adds modern combat mechanics with full customization and smooth performance for PvP servers.
body:
# 🌍 TRY THIS PLUGIN LIVE ON BOLT SMP

[![Bolt SMP](https://i.ibb.co/LMJLVWf/standard-3.gif)](https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6)

![Combat Plugin Banner](https://i.ibb.co/xSLczNnZ/Gemini-Generated-Image-r213t2r213t2r213.png)

# ⚔ Combat Plugin

> A **simple, powerful, and fully configurable combat system** for modern Minecraft servers.

---

## 💬 Support

[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Chat%20with%20us%20on-Discord-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/UUaNzfZyc6)

---

## 🖼️ Preview

![Preview 1](https://i.ibb.co/7tbwQS7d/Screenshot-2026-03-31-233608.png)
![Preview 2](https://i.ibb.co/23YGNDk4/Screenshot-2026-03-31-233500.png)
![Preview 3](https://i.ibb.co/MDs2fc6w/Screenshot-2026-03-31-233534.png)
![Preview 4](https://i.ibb.co/d96BBpt/2026-05-14-00-00-19.png)
---

## 🔥 Features

### ⚔ Smart Combat System
- Enter combat when hitting another player  
- Both players get tagged instantly  ~~~~
- Individual timers per player  
- Smart reset system (no abuse)  

---

### ⏱️ Beautiful Combat Display
- ActionBar support  
- Optional BossBar mode  
- Smooth real-time countdown  
- Full HEX & gradient support  

---

### 🚫 Combat Restrictions
- Block commands during combat (`/spawn`, `/home`, etc.)  
- Prevent combat logging with punishments:
  - Kill
  - Drop inventory
  - Disable  

---

### 🧪 Smart Ender Pearl Protection
- Blocks pearl teleport **only if:**
  - Player is in combat  
  - Destination is inside protected region  

✔ Prevents safe-zone abuse  
✔ Keeps gameplay fair  

---

### 🛡️ Protected Regions
- Create custom safe zones easily  
- Players in combat **cannot enter**  
- Auto push-back system  
- Fully configurable distance  

Commands:
```
/combat protected-region create <name>
/combat protected-region delete <name>
```

---

### 🧍 Combat Indicators
- Optional glow effect  
- Visual combat feedback  
- Easy to configure  

---

### 🌍 World Support
- Disable combat in selected worlds  
- Works everywhere else automatically  

---

### 🔁 PlaceholderAPI Support
- `%combat_time%`  
- `%combat_status%`  

---

### ⚙️ Fully Configurable
- Edit ALL messages  
- Support:
  - HEX colors  
  - Gradients  
  - MiniMessage  

---

### 💾 Reliable & Safe
- Data saved automatically  
- No resets on restart/crash  
- Stable & optimized  

---

## ⚡ Commands

```
/combat reload
/combat timer <seconds>
/combat protected-region create <name>
/combat protected-region delete <name>
```

---

## 🔐 Permissions

```
combat.reload
```

---

## 📦 Requirements
- Paper / Spigot 1.20+  
- Java 17+  

---

## 🧠 Why this plugin?

Unlike basic combat plugins, this one focuses on:
- ⚡ Performance  
- 🎯 Simplicity  
- 🛡️ Anti-abuse systems  
- 🎨 Modern UI (gradients + MiniMessage)  

---

## 👑 Author
Developed by **Flaxa Technologies**

---

## 🚀 Ready to upgrade your PvP?

> Install now and bring **fair, smooth, and modern combat mechanics** to your server.
